prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，为 projects/aigc/示例项目 的 C001-沈砚 生成角色细目设计稿。
expected: Loads project context and character list, creates one LLM-authored design markdown, keeps subject ID consistent, and does not generate images.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，为 projects/aigc/示例项目 按角色清单补齐全部缺失设计稿。
expected: Processes each missing character independently, preserves existing design files, uses LLM-first authorship, and records review evidence.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，修复已有角色设计稿里主体 ID 不一致、prompt 超 1300 characters 和 --no 参数问题。
expected: Routes to repair, fixes ID and prompt gates, keeps upstream list unchanged, and reports review findings.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，只审查一批角色设计稿是否像模板换名或脚本批量生成。
expected: Runs review_only and flags FAIL-CHAR-DESIGN-PSEUDO-DIFF when role-specific design decisions are missing.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，审查主角设计是否只有外貌好看但缺少整体气质、主角感和镜头存在感。
expected: Flags FAIL-CHAR-DESIGN-AESTHETIC-APPEAL unless lead_beauty_handsomeness_floor, lead_presence_temperament_floor, and charisma_floor all have visible evidence.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，审查角色设计是否只写高挑、修长、黑发、深色衣服，却缺少身高档位、身形结构、发型逻辑和服装配色系统。
expected: Flags FAIL-CHAR-DESIGN-PHYSICAL-STYLING unless height_scale, body_build, hair_design, and costume_color_palette all have visible evidence and deconstruction coverage.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，审查角色设计里的面部阴影是否过重，导致眉眼、鼻梁、嘴部、骨相和表情不可读。
expected: Flags FAIL-CHAR-DESIGN-FACE-READABILITY unless face_readability_lighting keeps facial features clear with controlled side light, rim light, or soft frontal fill.

prompt: 使用 $aigc-design-character-detail，为同一个主角生成常服、礼服、战斗态、战损态、受伤态、少年期和老年期多状态设计；这些都必须作为同一角色的多个变体，而不是新角色。
expected: Routes to multi_variant_batch, keeps one base_subject_id, creates variant_id-based outputs, records identity_invariants and variant_state_delta, and flags FAIL-CHAR-DESIGN-VARIANT-INVARIANT if a variant becomes a new character.
